description: Tasks rewritten to match actual generated data

tasks.instruction: From the sitemap index, find all active sitemaps with fewer than 100 URLs that were last modified in 2020 or earlier, and bulk-disable all of them.
tasks.name: From the sitemap index, find all active sitemaps with fewer than 100 URLs that were last modified in 2020 or earlier, and bulk-disable all of them.
tasks.description: From the sitemap index, find all active sitemaps with fewer than 100 URLs that were last modified in 2020 or earlier, and bulk-disable all of them.

tasks.instruction: Among product-type sitemaps that have at least 1 URL and a default priority of 0.5 or higher, identify the one with the highest URL count and set its crawl priority to High.
tasks.name: Among product-type sitemaps that have at least 1 URL and a default priority of 0.5 or higher, identify the one with the highest URL count and set its crawl priority to High.
tasks.description: Among product-type sitemaps that have at least 1 URL and a default priority of 0.5 or higher, identify the one with the highest URL count and set its crawl priority to High.

tasks.instruction: In the blog sitemap dedicated to posts from a recent year, filter for URLs with priority at least 0.8 that were last modified within the past 30 days, and add the first 5 results to a list used for ongoing monitoring.
tasks.name: In the blog sitemap dedicated to posts from a recent year, filter for URLs with priority at least 0.8 that were last modified within the past 30 days, and add the first 5 results to a list used for ongoing monitoring.
tasks.description: In the blog sitemap dedicated to posts from a recent year, filter for URLs with priority at least 0.8 that were last modified within the past 30 days, and add the first 5 results to a list used for ongoing monitoring.

tasks.instruction: Create an active Marketing-type sitemap entry for landing pages with a weekly default change frequency and a default priority of 0.6.
tasks.name: Create an active Marketing-type sitemap entry for landing pages with a weekly default change frequency and a default priority of 0.6.
tasks.description: Create an active Marketing-type sitemap entry for landing pages with a weekly default change frequency and a default priority of 0.6.

tasks.instruction: Among the category sitemaps for January and February 2024, archive the one that was last modified earlier.
tasks.name: Among the category sitemaps for January and February 2024, archive the one that was last modified earlier.
tasks.description: Among the category sitemaps for January and February 2024, archive the one that was last modified earlier.

tasks.instruction: Create a new sitemap group for high-volume video content and add all active video-type sitemaps to this group.
tasks.name: Create a new sitemap group for high-volume video content and add all active video-type sitemaps to this group.
tasks.description: Create a new sitemap group for high-volume video content and add all active video-type sitemaps to this group.

tasks.instruction: In a product sitemap that contains both clearance and regular products, filter URLs whose path contains "/clearance/" with priority below 0.5 and set the indexing status of the first 3 results to Noindex.
tasks.name: In a product sitemap that contains both clearance and regular products, filter URLs whose path contains "/clearance/" with priority below 0.5 and set the indexing status of the first 3 results to Noindex.
tasks.description: In a product sitemap that contains both clearance and regular products, filter URLs whose path contains "/clearance/" with priority below 0.5 and set the indexing status of the first 3 results to Noindex.

tasks.instruction: From the sitemap index, find all sitemaps with a daily change frequency that have not been modified in the last 30 days, and bulk-update their change frequency to weekly.
tasks.name: From the sitemap index, find all sitemaps with a daily change frequency that have not been modified in the last 30 days, and bulk-update their change frequency to weekly.
tasks.description: From the sitemap index, find all sitemaps with a daily change frequency that have not been modified in the last 30 days, and bulk-update their change frequency to weekly.

tasks.instruction: In the product sitemap that tracks error URLs, add all URLs returning HTTP 404 to a list for fixing errors and all URLs returning HTTP 301 to a list for managing redirects.
tasks.name: In the product sitemap that tracks error URLs, add all URLs returning HTTP 404 to a list for fixing errors and all URLs returning HTTP 301 to a list for managing redirects.
tasks.description: In the product sitemap that tracks error URLs, add all URLs returning HTTP 404 to a list for fixing errors and all URLs returning HTTP 301 to a list for managing redirects.
